items.title: the idea that organizations don't need hierarchies anymore because of ai is silly for sure, the…
items.content: the idea that organizations don't need hierarchies anymore because of ai is silly for sure, there's an opportunity for fewer layers of middle management. but every experience i've had with agents leads me to believe that specialization and therefore hierarchy is extremely valuable
